basic_details.job_title: CMD Kerala – Senior Project Engineer – 2 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Centre for Management Development Kerala (CMD Kerala) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Senior Project Engineer. Candidates with B.E/B.Tech Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 05-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CMD Kerala official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation in Civil Engineering from a recognised University

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CMD Kerala Senior Project Engineer Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: CMD Kerala Senior Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
